global.description: The ad features a full canvas background with a prominent VantaStyle logo in the top left corner. The main subject is a bold headline stating 'Flash sale live' centered in the upper middle section, accompanied by a 'SALE' badge in the top right. Below the headline, body text reads 'Only this weekend', and a call-to-action button labeled 'Install now' is positioned at the bottom center. Decorative elements enhance the visual appeal without overwhelming the main message.
global.visual_style: Modern flat design with vibrant contrasts
global.main_message: Limited-time flash sale on VantaStyle Drops
